title: Copying Data From One Machine and OS to Another
breadcrumbs: Copying Data From One Machine and OS to Another
text: Copying Data From One Machine and OS to Another To copy data from one machine and operating system to another: Ensure that your assignment file settings for paths and files are correct Convert the data on the source machine to XML format. Copy the XML file or files to the destination machine. Convert the XML file or files to the DBMS format you need on the destination machine. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
